plain_language_meaning: Each profile uses only a small portion of the full vocabulary.
technical_meaning: The TF-IDF matrix is high-dimensional and mostly zeros.
recommended_action: Use regularized Logistic Regression as a strong sparse-text baseline; interpret KNN cautiously.

plain_language_meaning: Some skills appear often while many appear rarely.
technical_meaning: Macro metrics will be lower than micro metrics because rare labels are harder to learn.
recommended_action: Report micro-F1, macro-F1, precision, recall, and per-skill performance for top modeled skills.

plain_language_meaning: Some profiles may not contain any modeled skills.
technical_meaning: All-zero target rows provide negative examples and protect against overprediction.
recommended_action: Keep zero-skill profiles unless they are confirmed data-quality errors.

plain_language_meaning: The alumni data may not look exactly like the 5k training data.
technical_meaning: Different text length or skill distributions can lower out-of-sample performance.
recommended_action: Explain external validation results separately from internal test results.

plain_language_meaning: The model can only predict skills included in the retained skill list.
technical_meaning: External labels outside the modeled skill space are out-of-vocabulary targets.
recommended_action: Report coverage of external labels inside the 100-skill model space before judging performance.
